svg.title: IoTsmart RP2040 overview
svg.desc: IoTsmart RP2040 — SoM controller based on Raspberry Pi RP2040
svg.text: SoM controller · Raspberry Pi RP2040 · plugs directly into IoTextra mezzanine modules
H-HOST or V-HOST connector · Qwiic · Open Hardware · Open Source firmware (MicroPython)
Part of the IoTsmart series · compatible with IoTextra mezzanine modules · Make Things Happy!
